page_metadata.biotools__summary: FineStr (pronounced as (fi-nes’tru), from Latin fenestra—window, and from fine structure]) server allows users to upload genomic sequences in FASTA format and to perform a single-base-resolution nucleosome mapping on them.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FineStr (pronounced as (fi-nes’tru), from Latin fenestra—window, and from fine structure]) server allows users to upload genomic sequences in FASTA format and to perform a single-base-resolution nucleosome mapping on them.
